name: Phase 2 — CIS Hardening Coverage
description: MITRE ATT&CK techniques mitigated by CIS Microsoft Windows Server 2022 Benchmark v5.0.0 hardening controls applied to Windows Server 2022 Domain Controller — soc-lab.local. Implementation period: April 8–12, 2026.

techniques.comment: WDigest authentication disabled (CIS 18.3.7). SeDebugPrivilege auditing enabled (CIS 17.8.1).
Interactive logon cached credentials limited to 4 (CIS 2.3.36).
Synchronize Directory Service Data user right set to empty (CIS 2.2.43). Directory Service Changes auditing enabled (CIS 17.4.2).
System Integrity auditing enabled (CIS 17.9.5). Boot-start driver initialization policy configured (CIS 18.8).
SMB signing enforced on client and server (CIS 2.3.42–47). File Share auditing enabled (CIS 17.6.2).
RPC authentication required (CIS 18.8).
BitLocker write protection enabled for removable drives (CIS 18.9). Removable Storage auditing enabled (CIS 17.6.4).
Other Object Access auditing enabled capturing scheduled task events 4698–4702 (CIS 17.6.3).
Other Object Access auditing enabled capturing scheduled task events 4698–4702 (CIS 17.6.3).
PowerShell Script Block Logging enabled — Event ID 4104 (CIS 18.9). PowerShell Transcription enabled (CIS 18.9). Process Creation command line logging enabled — Event ID 4688 (CIS 18.8).
Account lockout policy enforced — threshold 5, duration 30 minutes (CIS 1.2). Special Logon and Logon auditing enabled (CIS 17.5).
Account lockout policy enforced — threshold 5, duration 30 minutes (CIS 1.2). Special Logon and Logon auditing enabled (CIS 17.5).
Account lockout policy enforced — threshold 5, duration 30 minutes (CIS 1.2). Special Logon and Logon auditing enabled (CIS 17.5).
Account lockout policy enforced — threshold 5, duration 30 minutes (CIS 1.2). Special Logon and Logon auditing enabled (CIS 17.5).
Remote calls to SAM restricted to Administrators only (CIS 2.3.60).
Anonymous SID/Name translation disabled (CIS 2.3.51). Anonymous enumeration of SAM accounts blocked (CIS 2.3.52).
Security Group Management auditing enabled — Event ID 4728 (CIS 17.2.5).
Account lockout threshold set to 5 (CIS 1.2.2). Credential Validation auditing enabled (CIS 17.1.1).
Account Lockout auditing enabled — Event ID 4625 (CIS 17.5.1).
Create Token Object user right set to empty (CIS 2.2.13). Sensitive Privilege Use auditing enabled (CIS 17.8.1).
Create Token Object user right set to empty (CIS 2.2.13). Sensitive Privilege Use auditing enabled (CIS 17.8.1).
User Account Management auditing enabled — Event ID 4720 (CIS 17.2.6).
Always install with elevated privileges disabled (CIS 18.9).
User control over installs disabled (CIS 18.9).
Authentication Policy Change auditing enabled — Event ID 4706 (CIS 17.7.2).
Authentication Policy Change auditing enabled — Event ID 4706 (CIS 17.7.2).
Security System Extension auditing enabled — Event ID 4610 (CIS 17.9.4).
Security System Extension auditing enabled — Event ID 4610 (CIS 17.9.4).
Always install with elevated privileges disabled (CIS 18.9). UAC fully configured including Admin Approval Mode and secure desktop (CIS 2.3.90–99).
Always install with elevated privileges disabled (CIS 18.9). UAC fully configured including Admin Approval Mode and secure desktop (CIS 2.3.90–99).
NTLMv2 only enforced, LM and NTLM refused (CIS 2.3.69). UAC restrictions on local accounts applied (CIS 18.3.1). LM hash storage disabled (CIS 2.3.67).
NTLMv2 only enforced, LM and NTLM refused (CIS 2.3.69). UAC restrictions on local accounts applied (CIS 18.3.1). LM hash storage disabled (CIS 2.3.67).
Other Logon/Logoff Events auditing enabled — Event ID 4649 replay attack detection (CIS 17.5.5).
Other Logon/Logoff Events auditing enabled — Event ID 4649 replay attack detection (CIS 17.5.5).
Passwords not saved in RDP connections (CIS 18.9).
Strong key protection required — user must enter password each time (CIS 2.3.84).
Credential storage disabled for network authentication (CIS 2.3.54).
LLMNR disabled (CIS 18.5). NetBT NodeType set to P-node eliminating NBT-NS (CIS 18.3.6). SMB signing enforced (CIS 2.3.42–43).
LLMNR disabled (CIS 18.5). NetBT NodeType set to P-node eliminating NBT-NS (CIS 18.3.6). SMB signing enforced (CIS 2.3.42–43).
Kerberos Authentication Service auditing enabled (CIS 17.1.2). Directory Service Changes auditing enabled (CIS 17.4.2).
Kerberos encryption restricted to AES128 and AES256 — RC4 and DES eliminated (CIS 2.3.66). Kerberos Service Ticket Operations auditing enabled (CIS 17.1.3).
Kerberos Authentication Service auditing enabled — Event ID 4768 (CIS 17.1.2).
SafeDllSearchMode enabled (CIS 18.4.6).
SafeDllSearchMode enabled (CIS 18.4.6).
SafeDllSearchMode enabled (CIS 18.4.6).

legendItems.label: Mitigated by CIS v5.0.0 hardening controls
